# Catalog PDF upload area

Place downloadable PDF files for the Catalogs page in this folder.

Expected filenames used by the current Catalogs page:

- medical-booster-global-master-catalog-2024.pdf
- medical-booster-q3-wholesale-price-list.pdf
- dermal-fillers-ha-filler-specifications.pdf
- skin-boosters-meso-booster-portfolio.pdf
- clinic-devices-manual.pdf
- international-shipping-guide.pdf
- cold-chain-storage-guide.pdf

For local browser preview from `static-site/dist`, the build script should copy this folder to `static-site/dist/assets/catalogs/`.
